headers.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), interest-cohort=()
headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' https:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://*; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
